# OnlineFix

> OnlineFix is an independent electronics repair shop in Guildford, Surrey (UK), run by technician Tomas since 2018. Same-day repairs for phones, laptops, PCs, tablets and gaming consoles, with a 90-day warranty and a no fix, no fee policy. Appointment only — call or WhatsApp 07940 730537.

Key facts:

- Location: Guildford, Surrey, GU1 4PD, United Kingdom — also serving Woking, Godalming, Farnham and surrounding Surrey areas
- Contact: +44 7940 730537 (calls and WhatsApp), hello@onlinefix.uk
- Hours: by appointment, 7 days a week; calls and messages 10:00–22:00
- Rated 5.0 from 170+ Google reviews
- Policies: 90-day warranty on all repairs; no fix, no fee; free quote before any work starts

## Services

- [Console repair](https://onlinefix.co.uk/console-repair.html): PS5, PS4, Xbox Series X/S, Xbox One, Nintendo Switch and Steam Deck. HDMI port replacement from £60, deep cleaning and thermal paste from £30, board-level repairs
- [PlayStation repair](https://onlinefix.co.uk/playstation-repair.html): PS5 HDMI port replacement £80, disc drive £110, deep cleaning from £60
- [Xbox repair](https://onlinefix.co.uk/xbox-repair.html): Xbox Series X/S and Xbox One. HDMI port £80, overheating fix and cleaning from £30
- [Phone repair](https://onlinefix.co.uk/iphone-repair.html): iPhone, Samsung and Google Pixel. Screen replacement from £45, batteries, charging ports, water damage
- [Laptop repair](https://onlinefix.co.uk/laptop-repair.html): HP, Lenovo, Dell, ASUS and all other brands. Screens from £60, hardware diagnosis from £30, batteries, keyboards, SSD upgrades
- [MacBook repair](https://onlinefix.co.uk/macbook-repair.html): MacBook Pro and Air. Logic board, screen, battery, keyboard and SSD repairs with micro-soldering
- [PC repair](https://onlinefix.co.uk/pc-repair.html): desktops and gaming PCs. Diagnosis from £30, virus removal from £35, SSD upgrades from £40, custom builds
- [Tablet repair](https://onlinefix.co.uk/tablet-repair.html): iPad, Samsung Galaxy Tab and Surface. Screen replacement from £55, batteries and charging ports
- [Data recovery](https://onlinefix.co.uk/data-recovery.html): hard drives, SSDs, USB sticks and phones, from £45 — no data, no fee
